pythonFunction.name: search_properties
pythonFunction.description: For the July 4 demo, recommend beach destinations by passing destination_type='beach_coast', budget_total, travelers, origin, check_in, and check_out. Returns a choice_group payload with Martha's Vineyard, Outer Banks, and Kennebunkport destination cards. The older Sedona property mode still works when vibe/budget_per_night are passed.
